prompt: A hyper-realistic, full 4K resolution outdoor portrait photograph of a young woman with light skin and brown hair styled in a high ponytail with loose face-framing strands, bending forward at the waist to gently pet a young spotted fallow deer. She has a warm, genuine smile showing teeth, soft glowing dewy skin with visible natural pores and texture, deep red lipstick, subtle under-eye definition, and small gold stud earrings catching the light. She wears a flowing multi-pattern silk scarf wrapped loosely around her shoulders and one arm, featuring a mix of geometric tribal print, blue and white chevron stripes, navy color-blocking, and a tan leopard-print panel, draped over a navy spaghetti-strap top that exposes one shoulder. She pairs this with high-waisted ivory wide-leg trousers, fabric showing natural creases and weight. Her right hand rests affectionately on the deer's back, fingers gently curled into the fur. The deer is a young fallow deer with large alert upright ears showing fine internal fur detail and visible veining, white-spotted reddish-brown coat with individually discernible hairs, dark glassy eyes with catchlight reflections, and a moist black nose, standing calmly facing slightly left toward camera, positioned in the lower left foreground of the frame. Setting: an open grassy park with a soft-focus background of green lawn, scattered deciduous trees, and a low wooden fence rail visible on the right edge. Natural overcast daylight, soft diffused even lighting with gentle realistic shadows and accurate skin subsurface scattering. Technical specs: shot on a full-frame DSLR with an 85mm portrait lens at f/2.2, medium-close composition, shallow depth of field with smooth creamy bokeh, tack-sharp focus on subject's eyes and the deer's face, eye-level angle. Ultra-high detail, crisp fine textures (fabric weave, fur, skin), natural color grading with slightly muted greens and warm skin tones, soft realistic contrast, no artificial smoothing or plastic-skin look, authentic editorial lifestyle photography aesthetic. Aspect ratio 4:5, full 4K detail level.
